SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILANESE, KENT DBA KENT'S DELICATESSEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILANESE, KENT DBA KENT'S DELICATESSEN $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO KENT MILANSE DBA KENT DELICATESSEN RETURNED TO SENDER.
